Class Job

java.lang.Object
jobs.Job
Direct Known Subclasses:
Astrologian, Bard, BlackMage, Dancer, DarkKnight, Dragoon, Gunbreaker, Machinist, Monk, Ninja, Paladin, Pictomancer, Reaper, RedMage, Sage, Samurai, Scholar, Summoner, Viper, Warrior, WhiteMage
public abstract class Job extends Object
This class lays the groundwork for all jobs (Pictomancer, Sage, Bard, etc.) It controls the core of the jobs, including HP, spells and cantrips, and standard job logic.

  • Constructor Details

    • Job

      public Job()
      Job constructor

  • Method Details

    • getJobName

      public String getJobName()
      Gets the name of the job the player chose
      Returns:
      name The name of the job

    • getHP

      public int getHP(int conModifier)
      Gets the HP of the character by taking the base HP and adding the Constitution modifier
      Parameters:
      conModifier - The character's unique constitution modifier, calculated as the constitution stat minus ten, then divided by 2
      Returns:
      A minimum HP the user can have with a bad modifier. Insures it does not drop below 1

    • addJobOptions

      public abstract ArrayList<PlayerChoices> addJobOptions()
      Adds specialized job options to the character, such as startin equipment, hit die, and saving throws

    • addEquipment

      public void addEquipment(String item)
      Adds equipment to the ArrayList for starting equipment the user selects throughout the process
      Parameters:
      item - The item being added to the array

    • applyJob

      public abstract void applyJob() throws IOException
      Applies the job and associated info to the character
      Throws:
      IOException - throws IOE if file can't be found for cantrip/spells

    • printInventory

      public void printInventory()
      Prints the inventory of equipment the user picks throughout the process

    • getSavingThrows

      public String getSavingThrows()
      Gets the saving throws for the job
      Returns:
      the saving throws for the job

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the description for each job
      Returns:
      the description of the job

    • startingSpells

      public void startingSpells() throws IOException
      Loads a list of spells and cantrips from two files
      Throws:
      IOException - if file cannot be found, throw IOE

    • loadFromFile

      public ArrayList<String> loadFromFile(String filePath, String tag) throws IOException
      Randomly picks a set of cantrips and 1st level spells, reading from a text file to pick from
      Parameters:
      filePath - The exact path to the file to read from
      tag - The string that identifies the start and end of each job's lists of spells and cantrips
      Returns:
      the randomly picked spells and cantrips
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be found or the spells could not be loaded, throws IOE

    • getKnownCantrips

      public ArrayList<String> getKnownCantrips()
      Gets the list of known cantrips the job can learn
      Returns:
      knownCantrips returns the ArrayList of cantrips for a job

    • getFirstLevelSpells

      public ArrayList<String> getFirstLevelSpells()
      Gets the list of first level spells the job can learn
      Returns:
      firstLevelSpells Returns the ArrayList of first level spells for a job
